mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO comments
post_id, user_id, parent_id, content, status, like_count, created_at,
#{postId}, #{userId}, #{parentId}, #{content}, #{status}, #{likeCount}, #{createdAt},
mapper.select: SELECT id, post_id, user_id, parent_id, content, status, like_count, created_at FROM comments WHERE id = #{id}
SELECT id, post_id, user_id, parent_id, content, status, like_count, created_at FROM comments
SELECT id, post_id, user_id, parent_id, content, status, like_count, created_at FROM comments WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM comments WHERE user_id = #{userId}

SELECT c.id, CONCAT('评论：', CASE WHEN CHAR_LENGTH(c.content) > 28 THEN CONCAT(SUBSTRING(c.content, 1, 28), '...') ELSE c.content END) AS display_name, CONCAT('作者：', COALESCE(u.username, '未知用户'), ' / 内容：', COALESCE(p.title, '未命名内容')) AS subtitle, u.avatar_url, u.school, u.college FROM comments c LEFT JOIN users u ON u.id = c.user_id LEFT JOIN posts p ON p.id = c.post_id WHERE p.status = 1 AND ( c.content LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR u.username LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR p.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') ) ORDER BY c.created_at DESC LIMIT #{size} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM comments WHERE parent_id = #{parentId}
